category_sources: Official GitHub repository says mp3splt provides frame-accurate splitting of MP3, Ogg Vorbis, FLAC, and other audio formats: https://github.com/mp3splt/mp3splt
source_facts.description: Command-line interface to split MP3 and Ogg Vorbis files
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and package name: https://mp3splt.sourceforge.net/mp3splt_page/home.php
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository states the project was migrated from the original SourceForge project: https://github.com/mp3splt/mp3splt
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics and description mention audio, mp3, split, cut, flac, join, ogg: https://github.com/mp3splt/mp3splt
